name: app-blueprint
description: Desktop app blueprint with TypeScript and Electron

scripts.build: yarn clean && tsc --project tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-static-files.mjs
scripts.dist:linux: yarn build && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --publish never --config.directories.output=release/ubuntu
scripts.dist:mac: yarn build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never --config.directories.output=release/mac
scripts.dist:win: yarn build && electron-builder --win nsis zip --publish never --config.directories.output=release/windows
